title: Wholesome Peruvian Lotus Root Fried Rice
description: A quick, resinous fried rice that blends crunchy lotus root with savory chicken and Peruvian spices, finished on a robata grill for a smoky finish.

ingredients.name: jasmine rice
ingredients.notes: use day-old rice for best texture

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Add diced lotus root and stir-fry for 4-5 minutes until lightly browned and tender.
Push lotus root to side, add diced chicken, and cook until pink inside, about 3-4 minutes.
Add minced garlic, grated ginger, and sliced scallions, stir for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add cooled jasmine rice, breaking clumps with a spatula, and stir for 2 minutes.
Drizzle soy sauce, sesame oil, and lime juice, then toss to coat evenly.
Sprinkle pepper, stir, and cook for an additional 2 minutes until everything is heated through.
Transfer the mixture onto a preheated robata grill and sear each side for 30 seconds to impart a smoky char.
Remove from grill, fold in chopped cilantro, and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot, optionally accompanied by a side of lime wedges.
